A.text: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside

B.text: dissolves and mixes with the gas

parsed.answer_value: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside
parsed.rationale: The outer shell remains intact and expands as the red internal gas expands, indicating that the shell is semi-transparent and acts as a barrier, keeping the gas inside.
